scripts.build:flutter: cd lib/generated/api && dart pub get && dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs
scripts.clean:flutter: flutter clean && powershell -Command "if (Test-Path lib/generated/api) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force lib/generated/api }"
scripts.flutter:all: npm run clean:flutter && npm run generate:flutter && npm run postgenerate:flutter && npm run build:flutter
scripts.flutter:update-api: powershell -Command "if (Test-Path lib/generated/api) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force lib/generated/api }" && npm run generate:flutter && npm run postgenerate:flutter && npm run build:flutter
